cv.name: Maria Varagilal
cv.title: Senior Technical Product Designer & Frontend Development
cv.summary: Technical Product Designer with 10+ years of experience delivering digital products from concept to production. Skilled in design systems, product strategy, and frontend implementation using JavaScript, React, Redux, HTML, and CSS.
cv.note: Currently using AI to accelerate design-to-code workflows, from component generation and documentation scaffolding to rapid prototyping.

description: Shaped product experience, UI design, and end-to-end brand identity.
Architected product flows and content organization.
Designed and implemented designs into code using React, Redux, Gatsby, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
Built responsive, accessible UIs aligned with design systems.
Partnered with engineers on API integration and feature delivery.
Operated in a fast-paced, product-driven environment, balancing leadership with hands-on coding.
Used AI to accelerate design-to-code workflows.
Development of projects internally and externally.
Design and development of graphic concepts, proposals and projects for mobile and web app.
Social Media campaigns, images and apps.
Development of projects internally and externally. The tasks include developing graphic concepts, designing brochures, guides, roadmaps, and digital and paper infographics.
Development of proposals and projects for mobile and web app.
Design and development of editorial pages for magazines TV GUIA and FLASH

home.description: Technical Product Designer that ships code exploring AI & LLM — prompting for agent interfaces.

about.quote: Do it with passion, or not at all.
about.description1: Energetic by nature and licensed in Design—during the undergraduate degree the passion for digital took hold. Authentic Workaholic & Perfectionist: nothing is perfect and everything has room for improvement.
about.description2: From pixels to production—bridging design and code with JavaScript, modern frameworks, Redux, and clean UI development to turn ideas into full experiences that are thought through, built out, and ready to perform.
